tags.name: Kiosk
tags.description:
Endpoints that can be accessed from kiosks.

Kiosks must only use custom create Bearer tokens for authentication. And shall not contain the api key.

tags.name: Testing
tags.description: endpoints only available in development and testing

api-key.name: X-Api-Key
api-key.description: Key for none account related endpoints

bearer-token.description:
There are 3 types of bearer tokens. 
1. account specific
2. role specific - used for webhooks and kiosks
3. location specific - used when endpoints redirect

hook-security.name: wak
hook-security.description: Uses a bearer token that is valid for one endpoint only
